summaries.title: Dashboard Gap Implementation - API Keys and IDE Terminal tabs
summaries.summary: Implemented 31 UI gap improvements across the API Keys and IDE Terminal dashboard tabs, including search, sort, bulk operations, modals, session management, and toolbars. Key lessons: always read the state store first for dispatch actions and payload types, verify lucide-react icon availability, use targeted diffs instead of full-file writes, and batch all changes into a single atomic commit with TypeScript compilation verification.
